Off Calendar Feb-06-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Matter heard with case #418032.
Sung Shim, Esq. for Plaintiff: Limn Inc., a California Corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness: Michael Friedlander, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: ------------------------.
Matter is submitted and under submission.

Feb. 6, 2006
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan, see scanned doc for details.
